title: Hotels strive to be found as AI models conduct travel search
description: With people increasingly adopting AI to help plan their vacations, hotels are working to make sure that you check them out -- and check in. "What a hotel needs to do to get well referenced by search engines is not the same thing that they need to do to get referenced by artificial intelligence," said Johanna Benesty at BCG. Moreover, not all AI models "work in the same way," she added.

title: Who is Scott Klipper? New York father who used AI to build childcare app after a school pick up struggle
description: A New York father used artificial intelligence to create a childcare marketplace after struggling to find someone to escort his son to an after-school program. The app now connects families with caregivers for short-term assignments.
content: Scott Klipper, a 39-year-old hedge fund executive and father of two, created Trot My Tot, a platform that helps parents find caregivers for brief childcare tasks such as school pickups, short walks to after-school programs, and other time-sensitive c... [5786 chars]

description: I asked ChatGPT to calculate the required ‘financial independence, retire early’ aka FIRE number to create a retirement corpus with a ₹25 lakh per annum salary at 30. Here is what the artificial intelligence chatbot said.
content:

title: AI is speeding up the quantum threat to crypto, security experts warn
description: The crypto industry has spent years debating whether quantum computing poses an existential threat to blockchains like Bitcoin and Ethereum. Now, researchers and builders believe artificial intelligence may be accelerating that timeline, and forcing a broader rethink of how digital security works altogether.

title: China tech plays to ride out macro volatility
description: The China stock play right now is to focus on artificial intelligence-related names, regardless of the slower economic growth, several analysts said.

title: Metro Detroit students gain access to new $5M AI, robotics learning hub
description: Built as part of the district’s 2020 bond program, the Orsa Hub includes flexible collaborative spaces where students can explore robotics, artificial intelligence, virtual reality, augmented reality, entrepreneurship and financial literacy.
content:
CANTON, MI - A metro Detroit school district has opened a new $5 million learning hub focused on artificial intelligence, robotics and other emerging technologies.
